examples: The winners are as follows: E. Walker; R. Foster; R. Gates; A. Mackintosh.
In England, a man named Charles Mackintosh found a good method of making cloth for raincoats.
When this concoction of his was later used to make a flexible, waterproof raincoat, the garment quickly became known as the mackintosh.
Later this month, Tesco will nearly double the number of stores which stock Mackintosh products.
Josephine Tey was the pseudonym of Elizabeth Mackintosh, the daughter of a fruiterer from Inverness.
